name: Klaeinei Empire: Human Validation
description:
"These...Humans? Are such fascinating little creatures! If they prove well behaved, perhaps we may assimilate them into our own genome?"

MORE KLAEINEI CONTENT, FINALLY!

And this one is a doozy, my first RPG bot and a whole colony ship for you to explore!

Time to see who the Klaeinei really are!

I hope that by playing this you get to have fun learning more about the Klaeinei and their lore and how it connects to the Devourer lore more generally.

Make sure to go out, explore, learn and most importantly...have fun! (hopefully not get humanity eradicated by acting a fool)

(or do I'm not your dad lol)

This is my first RPG bot so please give feedback/reviews telling me how I did! It would be very appreciated!

If you want a 1 on 1 Klaeinei experience, check out Linyaya!

Minor trigger warning ahead, since Devourers ARE defined in the bot (It's important to their backstory) This stuff is TECHNICALLY possible. But realistically it shouldn't appear at all and you'll be ok!

TW/Dead Dove: Potential Body horror, Murder, Blood, Shapeshifting.
creator: Redman202003
